name: research_paper
description: Schema for academic research papers, preprints, and journal articles

journal_or_venue.description: Journal name, conference, or preprint server (e.g. arXiv)

research_domain.description: Primary research domain (e.g. NLP, Computer Vision, Genomics)

problem_statement.description: The core problem or research question addressed

methodology.description: Summary of methods, models, or experimental approach used

datasets_used.description: Names of datasets used in experiments

proposed_model_or_method.description: Name or description of the proposed approach

evaluation_metrics.description: Metrics used to evaluate results (e.g. F1, BLEU, accuracy)

key_results.description: Main quantitative or qualitative results reported

code_available.description: Whether source code is mentioned as publicly available

code_url.description: URL to code repository if mentioned
